keywords: 1 Digit Code from The World Meteorlogical Organization, Code source WMO 2700, in oktas

name: cloud_type
keywords: 1 Digit Code from The World Meteorlogical Organization, Code source WMO 0500

keywords: Micrograms Phaeopigment per liter seawater, measured fluormetrically

keywords: Micromoles Phosphate per liter of seawater

keywords: Reported Dynamic Height in units of dynamic meters (work per unit mass)

keywords: Micromoles Silicate per liter of seawater

keywords: 1 Digit Code from The World Meteorlogical Organization, Code source WMO 4300

name: wave_direction
keywords: Wave Direction reported using an abbreviated 360 degree azimuth circle with 00 representing True North, 18 represents 180 degrees

keywords: 1 Digit Code from The World Meteorlogical Organization, Code source WMO 4501

name: wet_air_temp
description: Wet air temperature from sling psychrometer

name: wind_direction
keywords: Reported using an abbreviated 360 degree azimuth circle with 0 representing True North, 18 representing 180 degrees

name: zooplankton_abundance
description: Zooplankton numerical abundance (volumetric density) per net tow, by higher taxon. Raw (uncorrected for net type).

name: zooplankton_abundance_areal
description: Zooplankton areal abundance (depth-integrated density) per net tow, by higher taxon. Raw (uncorrected).

name: zooplankton_biomass_carbon
description: Zooplankton carbon biomass per net tow, by higher taxon. Raw (uncorrected for net type).

name: zooscan_abundance
description: Zooplankton areal abundance from ZooScan optical imaging, by image-classified bioclass.

name: zooscan_biomass_carbon
description: Estimated zooplankton carbon biomass from ZooScan optical imaging, by bioclass.

name: zooscan_carbon_individual
description: Mean individual carbon content from ZooScan optical imaging, by bioclass.

name: zooscan_feret_diameter
description: Mean Feret diameter (organism size) from ZooScan optical imaging, by bioclass.

name: abundance
description: Specimen count per net tow (headline occurrence; standardize via std_haul_factor)

name: prop_sorted
description: Fraction of the sample sorted (event-level effort)

name: stage
description: Egg or larva developmental stage (obs_freq binned attribute; labeled via lookup)

name: std_haul_factor
description: Standardized haul factor (Smith & Richardson 1977; event-level effort)
keywords: Number used to standardize tows to catch per 10 meters squared of sea surface. See Kramer and Smith and Richardson references on the infosheet url for details.

name: volume_sampled
description: Volume of water filtered by the net (event-level effort)
keywords: Volume of water sampled by the net
